message:
feat(backpressure,resources,server): expand backpressure system, add MCP resource handlers, and enhance server capabilities

Major feature expansion across three areas of MCP Agent Mail Rust:

Backpressure system (mcp-agent-mail-core, +207 lines):
- Significantly expand the backpressure module with improved rate
  limiting, queue depth management, and flow control mechanisms
- Add configuration options in config.rs for backpressure tuning
- Export new backpressure types from core lib.rs

MCP resource handlers (mcp-agent-mail-tools, +556 lines):
- Add comprehensive resource module implementing MCP resource protocol
  handlers for inbox, thread, agent, and project resources
- Support resource://inbox/{Agent}, resource://thread/{id}, and other
  MCP resource URI patterns for efficient context-window-friendly reads

Server expansion (mcp-agent-mail-server, +398 lines):
- Major expansion of server lib.rs with new endpoint handlers and
  improved request routing
- Refactor TUI application (tui_app.rs, -65 lines net) to use cleaner
  state management patterns
- Minor adjustments across TUI modules (theme, chrome, widgets,
  action_menu, tool_metrics, ack_ttl) for consistency

Conformance testing (+120 lines):
- Add new conformance test scenarios covering the expanded backpressure
  and resource handler functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
